description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (WSL) that runs on push and pull request events to the main branch, excluding certain paths. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions to repository contents. It checks out the code, sets up Ninja, and then for a matrix of build types (x64-Debug-Linux, x64-Release-Linux) and GCC versions (12, 13, 14), it fetches a vcpkg commit hash, installs vcpkg, configures CMake with vcpkg, builds the project, cleans up, and then configures and builds the project again with shared libraries.
